# Options + RL Integration Prompt

Design an experiment where RL agents allocate between equity strategies and options overlays.

Include:
1. market regime assumptions,
2. option strategy template set (covered call, protective put, straddle, collar),
3. reward function balancing return vs drawdown,
4. hedge policy triggers (when to buy put protection),
5. evaluation metrics (Sharpe, max drawdown, downside capture, hedge cost).

Return an actionable experiment plan with ablations and expected failure modes.
